name: Light Warrior

style_guide_alignment.color_identity: White-gold armor + dawn-blue fabric + gold glow accents
style_guide_alignment.silhouette: Wide pauldrons, helmet crest, cape for motion — reads as heroic at gameplay distance
style_guide_alignment.sacred_motifs: Chest emblem (sacred circle), back device (radial spokes), crown band, gold trims
style_guide_alignment.readability: Warm palette contrasts sharply against violet corruption environment

next_gate: UE5 import, skeleton/rigging, animation set, Play-In-Editor movement test
